sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11676" key="a)pedi/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπεδίζω</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἄπεδος</etym>) <sense id="n11676.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">level,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἠπέδιζον τὴν ἀκρόπολιν</foreign> Clitod.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
